hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); protected=['.env','.env.example','projects.yaml','projects_macmini.yaml','agentsutra.db','scheduler.db']; sys.exit(2) if any(p.endswith(x) for x in protected) else sys.exit(0)"
python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(f'Edited: {p}') if p.endswith('.py') else None"
echo '' >> SESSION_LOG.md && echo '<!-- session ended: '$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')' -->' >> SESSION_LOG.md
